premises-NL: All students who complete the required coursework receive a passing grade.
Any student who receives a passing grade can enroll in the next semester.
John is a student who has completed the required coursework.
questions: Can John enroll in the next semester? (A) Yes (B) No (C) Cannot determine (D) Depends on other factors
explanation: Since John is a student who completed coursework, he gets a passing grade (P1). With a passing grade, he can enroll (P2). Therefore, John can enroll.

premises-NL: If a student has a GPA of 3.5 or higher, they are eligible for a scholarship.
Students who receive a scholarship do not need to pay tuition fees.
questions: Is Maria eligible for a scholarship? (A) Yes (B) No
Does Maria need to pay tuition? (A) Yes (B) No (C) Cannot determine
explanation: Maria has GPA >= 3.5, so she is eligible (P1). But eligibility doesn't mean she received the scholarship. We cannot determine if she pays tuition.

premises-NL: Every course that has more than 30 students requires a teaching assistant.
questions: Does Programming 101 require a teaching assistant? (A) Yes (B) No
Does Mathematics 201 require a teaching assistant? (A) Yes (B) No (C) Cannot determine
explanation: Prog101 has >30 students so requires TA (P1). Math201 has 25 (<=30), but P1 only says >30 requires TA, not that <=30 does NOT require TA.
